claims.summary: High-resonance/high-entropy semantic clusters can be lost if semantic truncation behaves like simple byte slicing.
Increasing porosity toward 0.75 when entropy is high could relieve overpacked mode texture.
Shadow-v3 stabilization or magnetization-anchor changes may help distinguishability but would alter live shadow behavior.
Pressure-risk plus mode-packing can create distinguishability collapse and should be made visible before live relief is approved.
